message:
feat: complete hardening sweep — all 30 beads closed

Batch commit covering the full hardening sweep:

API versions made configurable:
- Notion: DEFAULT_NOTION_VERSION + FCP_NOTION_API_VERSION env var
- Azure: AzureApiVersions struct + per-service env vars
- Salesforce: DEFAULT_API_PATH + FCP_SALESFORCE_API_PATH env var

Infrastructure env-overridable constants:
- fcp-streaming: heartbeat/zombie/reconnect via FCP_STREAMING_* env vars
- fcp-webhook: timestamp tolerance and max payload via FCP_WEBHOOK_* env vars
- fcp-telemetry: Prometheus port via FCP_TELEMETRY_PROMETHEUS_PORT (4 env vars)
- fcp-sdk: rate-limit retry-after via FCP_SDK_RATE_LIMIT_RETRY_AFTER_SECS
- fwc: history log rotation via FWC_MAX_LOG_SIZE_BYTES, FWC_MAX_ROTATED_FILES

Manifest schema additions:
- ConnectorStatus enum (ready/stub/experimental/deprecated) in ConnectorSection
- ManifestTimeouts already existed ([timeouts] section)

Placeholder fixes:
- DocuSign: stream_events returns honest error instead of empty array
- LLM-Router: route_request response includes dispatch_required flag

Scaffolded connector implementations (3 new):
- Firecrawl: scrape_url + crawl operations (46 tests)
- HuggingFace: text_generation + summarization + model_info (41 tests)
- Perplexity Search: chat_completions with citations (45 tests)

Stub marking: firecrawl→ready, huggingface→ready, perplexity-search→ready,
tlon/zalo/zalouser marked status=stub in manifest.toml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
